category_sources: source_facts.description says this provides building blocks for modern adaptive GNOME apps; official documentation describes Libhandy APIs for GNOME application UI building: https://gnome.pages.gitlab.gnome.org/libhandy/doc/main/

repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libhandy; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says adaptive GNOME app building blocks; official docs discuss Libhandy compilation and API version for GNOME libraries: https://gnome.pages.gitlab.gnome.org/libhandy/doc/main/
